title: ASB Skill Collection: metabolomics v1
description: Curated, evidence-grounded scientific-agent skill + tool + benchmark collection for metabolomics, derived by AgenticScienceBuilder (ASB) from 5 peer-reviewed source papers (4 included, 1 documented-excluded). Includes 106 deduplicated skills with EDAM annotations, 38 tool records with SPDX licensing + CycloneDX SBOM, per-paper benchmark tasks, silver/gold-tiered claim ledger, and CC-BY attribution notices.

creators.name: AgenticScienceBuilder
creators.affiliation: Holobiomics Lab, CNRS / Université Côte d'Azur

creators.name: Holobiomics Lab
creators.affiliation: Institut de Chimie de Nice (ICN), CNRS UMR 7272 / Université Côte d'Azur

notes: Source paper attribution + per-tier licensing handled per OPEN_ACCESS_POLICY.md; verbatim quotations sanitized for non-OA papers (see quotation_audit.json). Tool licenses + SBOM inventory at sbom.cdx.json. Per-paper attribution chain at NOTICES.md.
